pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 49: customer_name = "Northwind Safety Distributors" - created via xmlrpc.client call to res.partner.create()
setup_task.sh line 66: product_name = "Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E" - created via xmlrpc.client call to product.template.create()
setup_task.sh line 133: 'product_uom_qty': 50.0 - sales order quantity set via sale.order.line.create()
setup_task.sh line 104: target_qty = 30.0 - stock inventory set via stock.quant.action_apply_inventory()
setup_task.sh line 166: 'expected_backorder_qty': 20.0 - calculated as total_ordered - stock_available (50 - 30 = 20)

privileged_info_summary: All task metadata values are verified as accurate. The task uses entirely synthetic test data created during setup via Odoo XML-RPC API calls. A customer entity 'Northwind Safety Distributors' is created with a storable product 'Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E' priced at $45.00. Stock is set to 30 units in the internal Stock location. A sales order for 50 units is created and confirmed, generating a delivery order. The task requires the agent to process delivery of 30 units and create a backorder for the remaining 20 units. No external datasets or real-world data sources are used.
